title: Serial Killer Vlogs His Murder Spree

beats.description: Cold open featuring tense roadside encounter between deputy and suspect Gary Hilton
Introduction of Cheryl Dunlap's disappearance in Florida and initial investigation
Meredith Emerson vanishes in Georgia; witness accounts and tip line identify Hilton
Discovery of Cheryl's remains, 911 call spots Hilton, and he is arrested
Interrogation begins; Hilton's uncooperative demeanor shifts to philosophical monologues
Detailed confession of the abduction, struggle, and zip-tying of Meredith Emerson
Hilton's worldview, failed ATM runs, camping with hostage, and psychological manipulation
Hilton confesses to the brutal murder, decapitation, and disposal of Meredith's body
Body recovery, autopsy findings, perp walk, and initial state sentencing
Federal investigation reveals Bryant murders; Hilton receives additional life sentences
Florida trial, video evidence presentation, and death penalty sentencing

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: When you're going out to kill somebody, if you're seen by a single other person on the trail, then that's that day screwed. In Cherokee County, Georgia, a sheriff's deputy stops to question a man parked on private hunting lands. At worst, the man is guilty of trespassing. Or so the deputy thinks as he approaches. Good. Yourself, sir? What you doing out here? Well, you're the and the fourth person that's come along. Am I? And asked me that. I guess they called you, didn't they? Yes, I did. I you know, I just wanted a place to camp cuz I'm on my way to cut. I'm leaving. As a matter of fact, I'm getting my maps together. I got to bought some maps right now. That's why I just came out the place and ...
